system.description: Apply one blacklisted procedure to an adjacent ally. Choose one: **Resonance Weapon** — their unarmed/weapon attacks deal + RESONANCE additional resonant damage until their next turn; **Signature Null** — they become undetectable to technological systems for 1 turn; **Pain Redirect** — they ignore all wound penalties and HP-based penalties for 1 turn; or **Emergency Enhancement** — the next Forge Mending targeting them heals triple the amount.
